We do not integrate or plug into any uh P MS systems.
So we don't uh do anything like that where we're integrating with any kind of hidden data.
So it's all public data.

And every night we pull that information, it starts around 10 p.m. Eastern time and finishes around 2 a.m. Eastern time, which means that when you wake up on a Tuesday morning and you log into apartment IQ you're looking at all the data and information that was published as of last night.
So it's always as up to date as when you log in.
